questions.question: This British historical drama followed the lives of the Crawley family and their servants in the family's Edwardian country house.
What line of toys was introduced by Spin Master in 2016 that hatched from its own egg?
What legendary singer and daughter died three years apart under similar circumstances?
questions.answer: Whitney Houston and Bobbi Kristina Brown

questions.question: What former National Security Administration contractor leaked tens of thousands of confidential and classified documents?
What was JOMO?
questions.answer: Joy Of Missing Out; free of real or virtual activities
